summary.title: Your organization at a glance

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your MES workspace

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a reset link.
forgot.info: The link expires in 30 minutes. Check your spam folder if it does not arrive within 2 minutes.
forgot.successBody: We sent a reset link to the work email you provided. Follow the link to set a new password.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.subtitle: Enter the six-digit TOTP code from your authenticator app.

error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

users_screen.title: Users & roles
users_screen.no_users_body: Try selecting a different role or invite someone new to this workspace.
users_screen.role_permissions_description: What each role can do across modules. Edit by clicking a cell.
users_screen.invite_help: They'll receive an email with a magic link. The link expires in 7 days.
users_screen.invalid_invite: Enter an email address and select a role before sending the invitation.
users_screen.load_error: Users could not be loaded. Try refreshing the settings users page.
users_screen.permission_denied: Permission denied: settings.users.view or settings.users.invite is required to view users and roles.
users_screen.role_assignment_subtitle: Pick a user, then the new role.
users_screen.role_assignment_preview: Assigning {role} to {user}. Previous role {previousRole} will be replaced.

features.title: Feature flags
features.subtitle: Turn modules and features on for your workspace.
features.dryRunTitle: Preview affected modules + active sessions before saving flag changes
features.planNotice: You're on the {planName}. All premium features are included. Beta features are released incrementally.
features.freePlanNotice: You're on the {planName}. Premium features require an upgrade. Beta features are released incrementally.
features.earlyAccessCopy: Want to try a feature early?
features.empty: No feature flags are configured for this workspace.
features.dependencyRejectedBody: This feature is required by dependent modules. Review the affected modules before force-disable.
features.dryRunAffects: Activating this flag set affects {modules} modules across {sessions} active sessions.
features.dryRunApplyOnLoad: flags currently on. Changes apply on next page load for each user.

security_screen.title: Security
security_screen.subtitle: Authentication, session, and password policy.
security_screen.enforce_admins_hint: Admin accounts must use an authenticator app.
security_screen.password_expires_hint: Force rotation every N days. Not recommended by NIST.
security_screen.block_reuse: Block reuse of last N passwords
security_screen.enforce_sso_hint: Password login disabled for non-admin users when on.
security_screen.ip_allowlist_hint: Restrict admin login to specific IPs or ranges.
security_screen.add_ip_range_help: Add a CIDR range for administrator sign-in.
security_screen.permission_denied: You do not have permission to manage security settings.

audit_log_viewer.title: Audit logs
audit_log_viewer.summary: Full audit trail of all settings mutations. Partitioned monthly, retained 7 years. Org-scoped to your tenant only.
audit_log_viewer.org_notice_suffix: (your org). Cross-tenant viewing requires impersonate.tenant — not granted to your role.
audit_log_viewer.large_date_range_body: {days} days span ~{partitions} monthly partitions. Query may take longer.
audit_log_viewer.load_error: Unable to load audit log entries.
audit_log_viewer.empty: No audit log entries for selected filters.
audit_log_viewer.forbidden_message: Access denied for org_id-scoped audit logs. Required permission: {reason}.
audit_log_viewer.forbidden_role_codes: Role codes are not treated as permissions; cross-tenant viewing additionally requires the impersonation permission.

authorization.auditReasonPlaceholder: Describe why these authorization settings are changing
authorization.approvalPermissionHint: Fixed permission string used by the Technical gate.
authorization.approverRolesHint: Roles selected by the authorization policy row.
authorization.authorizePermissionHint: Fixed permission string required to approve a request.
authorization.authorizedRolesHint: Roles selected by T-126 policy data.
authorization.blockerApproverRoleMissing: Select at least one approver role
authorization.blockerAuthorizerRoleMissing: Select at least one authorized role
authorization.blockerGateRuleMissing: Technical approval gate rule is missing
authorization.blockerMinApproversInvalid: Minimum approvers must be at least 1
authorization.blockerRequiresNewVersionRequired: requires_new_version must remain true for released-product edits
authorization.blockerSelfAuthorization: Requester and authorizer must be different users
authorization.errorBody: Authorization policies could not be loaded. Refresh and try again.
authorization.invariantBanner: Authorized edits always create a new BOM/product-spec version; in-place mutation is never allowed. Factory-use approval remains locked until Technical signs off.
authorization.minimumAuthorizersHint: T-126 validates blockers and segregation of duties on save.
authorization.missingSeedBody: Required org_authorization_policies rows are absent. Seed these policy codes before editing settings:
authorization.npdDescription: Authorizes released product/BOM edit requests after NPD release.
authorization.pageSubtitle: Control who can request released product/BOM edits and technical approval gates.
authorization.readOnlyNotice: Read-only: settings.authorization.edit is required to change authorization policies.
authorization.requestPermissionHint: Fixed permission string used by workflows.
authorization.technicalDescription: Blocks production/factory use until Technical approval is recorded.
authorization.heading: Authorization Policies

manufacturing_operations.title: Manufacturing Operations
manufacturing_operations.subtitle: Configure tenant-specific operation names, process suffixes, industry seed sets, active state, and recipe sequence order.
manufacturing_operations.notice: Operations are referenced by routings, line assignments, and WIP code generators. The process suffix is immutable after creation.
manufacturing_operations.permission_denied: You do not have permission to manage manufacturing operations.
manufacturing_operations.empty: No manufacturing operations match the current filters.
manufacturing_operations.reset_dialog_body: This will replace all current operations with the selected industry seed data. Existing operation order, suffixes, and inactive rows will be reset.

company_profile.title: Company profile
company_profile.subtitle: Your company details, used across labels, invoices, and exports.
company_profile.empty: No organization profile is available for the current org.

company_profile.save_error: Company profile could not be saved.
company_profile.read_only_notice: You need settings.org.update to save company profile changes.
company_profile.hint_trading_name: Short name used in the UI.
company_profile.hint_logo: Appears on labels, invoices, and the login page.

notifications.smsHint: Via Twilio — only used for critical alerts.
notifications.slackHint: Post alerts to a Slack channel.
notifications.monthlyComplianceReportHint: Sent to Admins on the 1st of each month.

import_export.title: Import / Export
import_export.subtitle: Bulk import and export for Settings entities. Imports are audited, permission-gated, and fail closed for unsupported entities.
import_export.permission_denied: You do not have permission to view Settings import/export entities.

states.loading: Loading import/export jobs and entity configuration…
states.empty: No import or export jobs yet.

alerts.unsupported_import: {entity} is export-only; import is unsupported for this Settings entity. Use export for audit-safe reads.
alerts.authorization_policy: Authorization policies import requires settings.authorization.edit, audit reason, and successful T-122 dry-run. V-SET-43/V-SET-44 cannot be bypassed by CSV import.
alerts.feature_unavailable_title: Import/export processing is not available yet
alerts.feature_unavailable: Recent job history is read-only. Starting new imports or exports is disabled until the background worker drains import_export_jobs.

import_card.title: Import Settings entities
import_card.description: Upload CSV files, download templates, and route specialized imports through their owned preview flows.
import_card.async_job: Async job — you will be notified
import_card.dropzone: Drag and drop CSV or click to browse
import_card.audit_reason_placeholder: Explain why authorization policy CSV changes are being validated.
import_card.csv_required: CSV file is required before T-122 dry-run.
import_card.audit_reason_required: Audit reason is required before authorization policy import.
import_card.dedicated_flow_required: This Settings entity requires its dedicated preview/commit flow before import can proceed.
import_card.preflight_unavailable: T-122 preflight service is not configured for this environment.

export_card.title: Export Settings entities
export_card.description: Read-only exports use the selected global Settings entity and requested output format.

jobs.title: Recent jobs
jobs.description: Last 30 days. Statuses link every import/export action to audit evidence.

common.body: This page intentionally avoids mock business data. It proves the sidebar link resolves under the localized AppShell; the full business screen lands in its owning module wave.
common.title: Coming soon
common.description: This settings area is not yet available.

shifts.title: Shifts & calendar
shifts.description: Shift pattern and non-production calendar route is connected; the OEE/production wave owns the full scheduling editor.

products.title: Products & SKUs
products.description: Product and SKU route is connected; the Technical module wave owns the full item list and product master workflow.

boms.title: BOMs & recipes
boms.description: BOM and recipe route is connected; the Technical module wave owns the versioned BOM list and recipe workflow.

processes.title: Processes
processes.description: Process configuration route is connected; the production/technical module waves own the detailed process setup screens.

partners.title: Suppliers & customers
partners.description: Partner master-data route is connected; supplier and customer screens land in their domain waves.

devices.title: Scanner devices
devices.description: Scanner device administration route is connected; scanner production work remains isolated from the desktop scanner shell.

labels.title: Label templates
labels.description: Label template route is connected; document-template editing lands in the labels/document wave.

onboarding.title: Onboarding wizard
onboarding.description: Onboarding route is connected; setup flow screens remain available while the full admin wizard is wired.
onboarding.panelDescription: Launch or resume the guided setup wizard. Progress below reflects your organization's real onboarding state.

d365_dlq.title: D365 DLQ
d365_dlq.description: D365 dead-letter route is connected; shipping/export exception handling lands in the integration wave.

ship_override_reasons.title: Shipping override reasons
ship_override_reasons.description: Shipping override reason route is connected; rule/reference maintenance lands in the shipping/settings wave.

gallery.title: Modal gallery
gallery.description: Modal gallery route is connected for design-system verification and future QA evidence.

compliance.errorTitleRequired: Title must be at least 3 characters.

allergenWidget.title: Allergen cascade
allergenWidget.subtitle: Derived RM + process allergens, additive overrides, and the FG-final declaration (EU FIC 1169/2011 — 14 mandatory allergens).
allergenWidget.sectionDerivedSource: Auto-derived union of confirmed raw-material and process allergens.
allergenWidget.derivationNote: Contains = union(RM allergens) ∪ union(process allergens), with additive overrides applied. May-contain = precautionary (RM traces + conditional process).
allergenWidget.emptyBody: Add raw materials and processes to derive the allergen declaration for this FG.

allergenWidget.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why the auto-cascade is overridden…

create.catchHint: Catch weight requires nominal weight, gross weight max and a variance tolerance.

review.ready: Ready to create. An audit record will be logged.

deactivate.subtitle: Removes {code} from active pick-lists. Open WOs continue; no new WOs can be created.
deactivate.warning: {name} will be blocked. BOMs remain for audit. This sets status to blocked.
deactivate.notesRequired: Notes are required when the reason is Other (min 10 chars).
deactivate.confirmLabel: Type the item code {code} to confirm
deactivate.confirmMismatch: The entered code does not match.

errors.already_exists: An item with that code already exists in this organization.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.

errors.persistence_failed: Could not save. Please try again.

list.title: Items
list.description: Master item catalogue — raw materials, intermediates and finished goods used across BOMs, routings and costing.
list.emptyBodyCreate: Create your first item to start building BOMs and routings.
list.emptyBodyView: No items have been created yet.
list.errorBody: Something went wrong while loading the item catalogue. Please try again.
list.truncated: Showing the first {limit} of {total} items. Refine your search to narrow the list.
list.viewerOnly: You have view-only access to items.
list.filterEmptyBody: Adjust the type tab, status, or search to see more items.

tab.title: Allergen profile
tab.subtitle: Per-item allergen declaration (EU FIC 1169/2011 — 14 mandatory allergens). Auto-cascaded badges are read-only; manual overrides are additive and require a reason.
tab.emptyBody: Allergens cascade automatically from BOM components and process additions; declare a manual override to add one to the final label.
tab.error: Unable to load the allergen profile. Please try again.
tab.forbidden: You can view allergens but cannot edit this item’s profile.

modal.title: Declare allergen
modal.subtitle: Override the auto-cascade to declare the final product label.
modal.autoNote: Auto-suggestions come from BOM component allergen flags. Override here to declare the final product label — the cascade source is preserved.
modal.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why the auto-cascade is overridden…
modal.reasonRequired: A reason is required for a manual override (V-TEC-42).
modal.saveError: Could not save the override. Please try again.

audit.title: Manual override audit
audit.subtitle: Append-only history of manual allergen overrides — one immutable row per (item × allergen × actor × timestamp).
audit.emptyBody: When an allergen is manually overridden, an immutable audit row is appended here with the actor and timestamp.
audit.error: Unable to load the override audit. Please try again.
audit.forbidden: You do not have permission to review allergen overrides.

config.title: Allergens configuration
config.subtitle: Manufacturing-operation allergen additions and the line × allergen cross-contamination risk matrix (EU FIC 1169/2011).
config.gapBanner: {count} line × allergen combinations have no contamination-risk entry.
config.empty: No lines or operations configured yet
config.emptyBody: Add production lines (Settings → Infrastructure) and manufacturing operations to build the contamination-risk matrix.
config.error: Unable to load the allergens configuration. Please try again.
config.forbidden: You do not have permission to view the allergens configuration.
config.saveError: Could not save the change. Please try again.

cascade.title: Allergen cascade preview
cascade.subtitle: Read-only derivation chain RM → Intermediate → Process → Finished good per EU 1169/2011.
cascade.ruleBody: Finished-good allergens = union of raw-material allergens via BOM + process additions per stage. Manual overrides are preserved.
cascade.noFinal: No allergens in the final profile.
cascade.brcgsNote: BRCGS P1 v9 and EU 1169/2011 require documented cascade evidence. This preview is the read-only visualization; allergen edits happen in Product detail → Allergens.
cascade.emptyBody: No finished goods with a published BOM were found. Publish a BOM to see its allergen derivation chain.
cascade.error: Could not load the allergen cascade. Please try again.
cascade.denied: You do not have permission to view the allergen cascade.

contamination.title: Contamination risk matrix
contamination.subtitle: Line × allergen cross-contamination risk grid. Feeds the allergen changeover gate in production.

legend.title: Legend
legend.high: High — segregation needed, different run day

contamination.changeoverNote: Changeover gate: when the next work order’s allergen-free claim clashes with a high/medium cell on the scheduled line, production blocks the start until cleaning validation, ATP swab ≤ 10 RLU and dual sign-off.
contamination.emptyBody: Add production lines and allergens to start mapping cross-contamination risk.
contamination.error: Could not load the contamination risk matrix. Please try again.
contamination.denied: You do not have permission to view the contamination risk matrix.
contamination.saveError: Could not save the risk level. Please try again.

matrix.title: Allergen matrix
matrix.subtitle: At-a-glance allergen presence across all active products. Select a cell to see source ingredients.
matrix.emptyBody: No active products with allergen data were found. Add products to populate the matrix.
matrix.error: Could not load the allergen matrix. Please try again.
matrix.denied: You do not have permission to view the allergen matrix.

process.title: Process allergen additions
process.subtitle: Admin-only config mapping a manufacturing operation to the allergens it introduces. The cascade rule merges these into finished-good allergen profiles.
process.infoNote: When a BOM uses an operation listed here, the cascade rule automatically adds the mapped allergens to the finished-good profile.
process.warnNote: The allergen must exist in the allergens reference. Edits here trigger an async cascade rebuild on all finished goods using these operations.

modal.title: Add process allergen mapping
modal.reasonPlaceholder: Why this operation introduces the allergen
modal.subtitle: Map a manufacturing operation to an allergen it adds; the cascade rule merges it into every FG that uses the operation.
modal.reasonHelp: Audit-logged. Why this operation introduces the allergen.

process.emptyBody: Add a mapping to declare allergens introduced by a manufacturing operation.
process.error: Could not load process allergen additions. Please try again.
process.denied: You do not have permission to view process allergen additions.
process.saveError: Could not save the mapping. Please try again.

edit.addComponentSubtitle: Search the material master and set quantity / scrap

edit.manufacturingOperationRequired: Pick a manufacturing operation before saving.
edit.changeReasonHelp: Referenced from Planning WO snapshots — min 10 chars.
edit.previousVersionNote: Previous version (v{version}) stays available read-only for existing work orders.
edit.newDraftNotice: This BOM is {status}. Saving creates a new draft version — the released version is never edited in place.
edit.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.
edit.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.

actions.deleteStatusBlocked: Only draft versions can be deleted — approved or active versions are never removed.

bomDelete.warning: Version {version} will be permanently removed. Planning WO snapshots that reference this version will show as “orphaned”.
bomDelete.blockedBySnapshots: Blocked: {count} work-order snapshot(s) reference {version}. Delete the snapshots first.
bomDelete.blockedByStatus: Only draft versions can be deleted. Active or approved versions are never removed.

bomGraph.intro: Material flow: raw ingredients → sub-BOMs → process → finished product.

bomGraph.emptyParents: This FG is not used as a component in any other BOM.

bomRecipe.emptyLines: This BOM version has no ingredient lines.

bomHistory.subtitle: Immutable audit timeline of every change to this BOM — versions, approvals and releases.

bomHistory.emptyFiltered: No changes by the selected actor.

compliance.title: Regulatory compliance dashboard
compliance.subtitle: At-a-glance status of the FG portfolio against active regulations. Routing and remediation only — not legal advice.
compliance.routingNotice: Routing only. This dashboard surfaces gaps and routes them to the owning module (09-Quality for lab/NCR lifecycle, Technical for spec/label rework). It does not replace legal review or HACCP-team judgment.
compliance.gaps: {count, plural, =0 {No open gaps} one {# open gap} other {# open gaps}}

flags.title: Per-FG flags · {count}
flags.hint: Click Route to dispatch to the owning module — never auto-resolved here.
flags.empty: No open compliance flags for the active FG portfolio.

empty.title: No finished goods yet
empty.body: Create active FG items in the Items master to track their regulatory coverage here.

compliance.error: Unable to load the compliance dashboard. Please try again.

allergen_declaration_missing.label: Allergen declaration missing
allergen_declaration_missing.remediation: Add an allergen profile in the item master, then re-issue the label.

factory_spec_unapproved.label: Factory spec not approved for factory use
factory_spec_unapproved.remediation: Approve the FactorySpec + BOM bundle in Factory specs.

shelf_life_missing.label: Shelf-life configuration missing
shelf_life_missing.remediation: Set shelf-life days/mode in the item master.

supplier_spec_missing.label: No active supplier spec
supplier_spec_missing.remediation: Activate a supplier spec in the supplier-specs admin.

lab_result_failing.label: Lab result failing or on hold
lab_result_failing.remediation: Route to 09-Quality — Technical surfaces the remediation link only.

compliance.truncated: Showing the first {limit} of {total} active finished goods.

labResults.title: Lab results log (read-only)
labResults.subtitle: Quality-owned lab_results read model surfaced in Technical for FG/spec context. Technical never writes lab results — entry, NCR lifecycle and sign-off live in 09-Quality.
labResults.readOnlyNotice: Read-only here. To enter, edit, retest, sign-off, raise an NCR or attach a CoA, open
labResults.searchPlaceholder: Filter by FG / work order / lab id
labResults.sourceNote: Source: Quality-owned lab_results projection. Technical specs link results for read-only context only.
labResults.empty: No lab results match the current filter.
labResults.error: Unable to load lab results. Please try again.

costImport.title: Cost import from D365
costImport.subtitle: Optional integration source — local cost history remains the source of truth. The D365-disabled state keeps this surface read-only and never blocks factory release.
costImport.disabledBanner: D365 connector disabled for this org. Cost import is unavailable. Local cost history remains source of truth and is editable from Technical › Costs.
costImport.sourceOfTruthNote: Local cost history is source of truth. Importing from D365 appends a new cost entry tagged source=d365_sync; it never overwrites in place. Items with |Δ| ≥ 5% require Technical sign-off.

signoff.label: Sign-off reason
signoff.help: Audit-logged with the import. Required when |Δ| ≥ 5% on any row (min 10 characters).
signoff.placeholder: e.g. Q2 cost refresh approved by Controlling 2026-04-30.

costImport.triggerForbidden: You do not have permission to trigger a D365 import.
costImport.triggerError: Unable to trigger the import. Please try again.
costImport.empty: No incoming D365 cost differences to review.
costImport.error: Unable to load the D365 cost import. Please try again.

tooling.title: Tooling & equipment setups
tooling.subtitle: Equipment and tooling setups derived from routing operations — each operation that binds a line or machine with a setup time.
tooling.error: Unable to load tooling setups. Please try again.

empty.title: No tooling setups yet
empty.body: No routing operations bind a line or machine in this organization yet.
empty.bodyCanWrite: Author a routing with line/machine-bound operations to populate the equipment setup list.

list.noMatches: No setups match the current filter.

bulkImport.title: Bulk import (CSV)
bulkImport.subtitle: Org-scoped wizard for FG / WIP / RM / supplier_specs rows. No D365 dependency.
bulkImport.permissionDenied: You do not have permission to import items.
bulkImport.orgScopedNote: Imports are org-scoped — only the active organization's catalog is touched. No D365 dependency.

reason.label: Audit note
reason.placeholder: e.g. Q2 refresh — supplier swap S-101→S-202.
reason.help: Recorded in the import audit trail; min 10 characters.

bulkImport.forbidden: You do not have permission to import items.
bulkImport.parseFailed: Could not parse the CSV. Check the header row and try again.
bulkImport.supplierBlocker: Some rows reference a supplier that requires a supplier_spec upload before the catalog row can reference it.

bomSnapshots.title: BOM snapshots
bomSnapshots.subtitle: Immutable Planning work-order snapshots of shared BOM versions. Read-only — snapshots never mutate the canonical BOM.
bomSnapshots.error: Unable to load BOM snapshots. Please try again.

empty.title: No BOM snapshots yet
empty.body: Snapshots are captured when a work order is released against a BOM version.

bomSnapshots.immutableBanner: Immutable. A snapshot is the BOM frozen at work-order release. Editing a snapshot is forbidden — propose an ECO on the canonical BOM and trigger a clone-on-write on the next work order.
bomSnapshots.orphanedNote: Orphaned = the canonical BOM version was deleted; the snapshot stays read-only for audit/traceability. Open the diff to see the frozen line-set.
bomSnapshots.noMatches: No snapshots match the current filter.

modal.title: Snapshot diff
modal.readOnly: Read-only. Snapshot is immutable. To apply the current canonical BOM, trigger clone-on-write on the next work-order release — never mutate this snapshot.
modal.error: Could not compute the diff. Please try again.
modal.empty: No differences between this snapshot and the current canonical BOM.

recipeCost.title: Recipe costing
recipeCost.subtitle: Standard-cost roll-up based on BOM quantities × current material rates. Read-only; master cost is edited under Cost history.
recipeCost.selectPrompt: Select a product to roll up its recipe cost.
recipeCost.loadError: Unable to load the recipe cost. Please try again.
recipeCost.noLines: This BOM has no lines yet.
recipeCost.bomNote: Rolled up from BOM v{version} ({status}). Material cost only — labour / overhead are Finance-owned.

state.error: Unable to load recipe costing. Please try again.
state.emptyBody: Create a BOM for a finished good or intermediate to roll up its recipe cost.

recomputeModal.title: Recompute standard cost
recomputeModal.intro: Re-roll the BOM cost from current material rates.
recomputeModal.note: Non-destructive — re-rolls Σ(line qty × current cost/kg) live for the selected product. Nothing is overwritten; the figure simply refreshes from the latest item costs.

costHistory.title: Cost history
costHistory.subtitle: Timeline of standard-cost changes per item across cost rolls. Technical edits the master cost and history; valuation and variance are Finance-owned.
costHistory.selectPrompt: Select an item to view its cost history.
costHistory.loadError: Unable to load cost history. Please try again.
costHistory.noHistoryCanEdit: Record the first cost roll to start the timeline.
costHistory.readOnlyNotice: You can view cost history but do not have permission to edit master cost (technical.cost.edit).

modal.title: Edit cost · {code}
modal.intro: Recording a new cost closes the active row and writes a history entry. Changes > 20% require an approver (V-TEC-53).

error.forbidden: You do not have permission to record a cost change.
error.invalid: Please check the values and try again.
error.approverRequired: This cost change exceeds 20%. Enter an approver to record it (V-TEC-53).
error.generic: Could not save the cost change. Please try again.

state.error: Unable to load cost history. Please try again.
state.emptyBody: Create an item in the item master to track its cost history.

nutrition.title: Nutrition panel
nutrition.subtitle: Per-100 g macronutrients and the 14 EU-declared allergens. Materialized from NPD and read-only here — drives the customer-facing label.
nutrition.selectPrompt: Select a product to view its nutrition panel.
nutrition.noAllergens: No allergen declarations recorded for this product.
nutrition.noMacros: No macronutrient values recorded for this product.
nutrition.computedNote: Recomputed from the materialized NPD nutrition model on {when}.
nutrition.computedNoteNoDate: Materialized from the NPD nutrition model.
nutrition.loadError: Unable to load the nutrition panel. Please try again.

state.error: Unable to load nutrition profiles. Please try again.
state.emptyBody: Nutrition profiles are materialized from NPD formulations. None exist for this org yet.

shelfLife.title: Shelf-life configuration
shelfLife.subtitle: Per-product use-by vs. best-before rules. The regulatory preset controls which mode is legally required.

modal.title: Override shelf life
modal.warning: Override leaves the regulatory preset — requires QA sign-off and is logged to the audit trail.
modal.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. MAP parameter change (30% CO₂) confirmed by microbiological study no. 2026/04/17-A.

shelfLife.regulatoryNote: Regulatory preset source: Regulation (EU) 1169/2011 · PL HACCP GHP/GMP guidelines. Changing a preset triggers an engineering change order.

state.error: Unable to load shelf-life rules. Please try again.
state.emptyBody: Create a finished good in the item master to configure its shelf life.
state.readOnly: You can view shelf-life rules but do not have permission to override them.

error.invalid: Please check the values and try again.
error.forbidden: You do not have permission to override shelf life.
error.generic: Could not save. Please try again.

materials.title: Materials
materials.description: Raw materials and intermediates in the item master.
materials.emptyBody: Create a raw material or intermediate in the item master.
materials.noMatchBody: Adjust the type tab, status, or search to see more.

sensory.title: Sensory evaluation
sensory.subtitle: Technical-owned sensory read model. NPD approval and Quality release guards read this state; this screen never moves the NPD gate.
sensory.readOnlyNote: Read-only. Sensory is a reported read model — NPD remains the gate owner and consumes this status read-only.
sensory.sourceNote: Source: technical_sensory_evaluations (Technical-owned read model). fail / hold surface SENSORIAL_BLOCKED for downstream release guards.

state.error: Unable to load sensory evaluations. Please try again.
state.emptyBody: Sensory subjects appear here once an evaluation is recorded. Until then NPD treats sensory as not required.
state.denied: You do not have permission to view sensory evaluations.

routings.title: Routings
routings.subtitle: Ordered manufacturing operations per item, bound to lines and machines — drives the cost preview and resource utilization.

empty.title: No routings yet
empty.body: Select an item to create its first routing version.

routings.error: Could not load routings. Please try again.

manager.selectItemPrompt: Select an item to view its routings.
manager.loadError: Unable to load routings. Please try again.
manager.emptyBody: No routings yet for this item.
manager.emptyBodyCanWrite: Create the first routing version to define its operations.
manager.permissionDenied: You can view routings but do not have permission to author them (technical.bom.create).
manager.modalIntro: Operations run in order (op 1 → n). Each operation binds a line or a machine (V-TEC-61) and a manufacturing-operation name from the reference (V-TEC-63).
manager.errForbidden: You do not have permission to author routings.
manager.errInvalidInput: Please check the operation values and try again.
manager.errNotFound: That item or routing no longer exists.
manager.errAlreadyExists: A routing with that version already exists for this item.
manager.errInvalidState: Only a draft routing may be edited or transitioned that way.
manager.errSequenceGap: Operation numbers must be contiguous from 1 (V-TEC-60).
manager.errNoResource: Every operation must bind a line or machine (V-TEC-61).
manager.errZeroRunTime: Production operations need a run time greater than 0 (V-TEC-62).
manager.errUnknownOperation: An operation name is not in the manufacturing-operations reference (V-TEC-63).
manager.errGeneric: Could not save the routing. Please try again.

factorySpecs.title: Factory specifications
factorySpecs.subtitle: Technical-owned production specifications (factory_spec / internal_product_spec) per finished good — versioned, released on Technical approval.

empty.title: No factory specifications yet
empty.body: Create a factory specification, or approve an NPD-seeded draft for factory use.

factorySpecs.error: Unable to load factory specifications. Please try again.
factorySpecs.permissionView: You can view factory specifications but cannot approve them for factory use.

modal.title: Review specification · {spec}
modal.subtitle: {name} · v{version}
modal.cloneOnWrite: This version is released and immutable. Editing creates a new version (clone-on-write) that returns to Technical approval before factory use.
modal.g4Note: NPD Gate-4 alone does not unlock factory use — a paired Technical FactorySpec + BOM approval is required.
modal.permissionDenied: You do not have the Technical permission to approve this specification for factory use.

releaseBundle.title: Approve FactorySpec + BOM bundle
releaseBundle.subtitle: {fg} · paired Technical release
releaseBundle.cloneBanner: Clone-on-write applied. Approving this bundle releases the FactorySpec + BOM to factory use locally — independent of D365.
releaseBundle.noBlockers: No blockers — bundle is ready for Technical approval.
releaseBundle.approveDisabled: Approve disabled — resolve {count} blocker(s) above (supplier_spec, RBAC, release guard).
releaseBundle.approveHelp: Releases the FactorySpec + BOM bundle to factory use. Local Technical release — D365 sync is optional/informational.
releaseBundle.rejectHelp: Both artifacts return to draft; the author is notified with the reason below.
releaseBundle.pinHelp: Your password/PIN confirms this approval (CFR 21 Part 11). It is verified server-side and never stored.
releaseBundle.d365Disabled: D365 integration is disabled. Local Technical approval still unlocks factory use — D365 sync is informational only.
releaseBundle.permissionDenied: You do not have the Technical permission to approve this bundle.
releaseBundle.error: Unable to load the release bundle. Please try again.
releaseBundle.approved: Bundle approved — FactorySpec and BOM released to factory use.
releaseBundle.rejected: Bundle rejected — both artifacts returned to draft.
releaseBundle.actionError: Could not complete the action. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Production
dashboard.subtitle: Live shift view — work orders, output, OEE and downtime.
dashboard.error: Live production data is currently unavailable. Please retry shortly.
dashboard.denied: You do not have permission to view the production dashboard.

woList.title: Work orders ({count})
woList.empty: No work orders yet — released work orders from Planning appear here.
